title: SQL: timestamp comparisons do not work
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE datetest (low TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, high TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO datetest (low, high, description) VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2004-12-27 16:29:57.409', TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 00:00:00.000', 'Test range 1');
INSERT INTO datetest (low, high, description) VALUES (NULL, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 00:00:00.000', 'Test range 2');
SELECT * FROM datetest WHERE NOW() > COALESCE(low, TIMESTAMP '2000-01-01 00:00:00.000') AND NOW() < high;
SELECT * FROM datetest WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM datetest d2 WHERE d2.low < NOW() AND d2.high > NOW());
key_bug_features: Timestamp comparisons in SQL queries fail to function
